name: bc-grid-monorepo
description: bc-grid — a high-performance shadcn-native data grid built to compete with AG Grid.

scripts.build: bun run build:packages && bun run --filter './apps/*' build
scripts.build:packages: bun run --filter '@bc-grid/core' build && bun run --filter '@bc-grid/animations' build && bun run --filter '@bc-grid/virtualizer' build && bun run --filter '@bc-grid/theming' build && bun run --filter '@bc-grid/aggregations' build && bun run --filter '@bc-grid/filters' build && bun run --filter '@bc-grid/server-row-model' build && bun run --filter '@bc-grid/export' build && bun run --filter '@bc-grid/react' build && bun run --filter '@bc-grid/editors' build && bun run --filter '@bc-grid/enterprise' build
scripts.test: bun test $(find packages tools tests -path packages/react/tests/dom -prune -o -type f \( -name '*.test.ts' -o -name '*.test.tsx' -o -name '*.test.js' -o -name '*.test.jsx' \) -print)
scripts.publish:packages: for pkg in packages/*/; do (cd "$pkg" && bun publish); done
